title: Forge Improvement Proposal
description: A proposed improvement to a forge, submitted by learning-forge for forge-forge to review. The proposals directory is the inbox. forge-forge is the authority.

learning.description: The learning that produced this proposal — one actionable sentence

target_forge.description: Which forge this proposal would change

target_file.description: Specific file path within the target forge

change.description: What to add, modify, or remove

why.description: How this improves every future agent that uses the target forge

evidence.description: The specific incident — logs, scores, error messages — that proves this matters

status.description: Lifecycle state. Only forge-forge changes this.
